reasoning: The FedRAMP CM-3 (1) control focuses on automated documentation, notification, and prohibition of configuration changes. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that configuration changes are audited and logged, unauthorized changes are prohibited through RBAC, and notifications can be managed through admission controllers and API server webhooks. These functions ensure that configuration changes are tracked and unauthorized changes are prevented, aligning with the control's requirements.
title: Configuration Change Control | Automated Documentation, Notification, and Prohibition of Changes
